items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking a Director of Customer Success to build and lead a team that drives customer retention, expansion, and advocacy. You will define the CS strategy, establish scalable processes, and create a data-driven organization that delivers measurable business outcomes for our customers.

Reporting to the CRO, you will be a key member of the revenue leadership team and directly responsible for net revenue retention and customer satisfaction metrics.

Responsibilities

  • Build, hire, and lead a team of 8-12 Customer Success Managers and CS Operations staff
  • Define and implement the customer success strategy, including segmentation, playbooks, and health scoring
  • Own net revenue retention (NRR) targets and drive expansion through upsell and cross-sell motions
  • Establish scalable onboarding, QBR, and renewal processes
  • Build executive relationships with strategic accounts
  • Collaborate with Sales, Product, and Support to align on customer outcomes

Requirements

  • 8+ years of customer success experience, with 3+ years leading CS teams
  • Proven track record of driving NRR above 110% in a B2B SaaS environment
  • Experience building CS teams and processes from the ground up or scaling them significantly
  • Strong analytical skills and experience with CS platforms (Gainsight, Totango, or ChurnZero)
  • Excellent executive presence and communication skills

Nice to Have

  • Experience in the CMS, DXP, or MarTech space
  • Background in professional services or technical consulting
  • Experience managing customer advisory boards or community programs
